text: Absolutely love this seat. Installation was super easy with the latch system. Feels very secure. Used it from hospital day 1.
Great for newborns. The infant insert is a nice touch. Only complaint — the canopy is small and doesn't block much sun.
Buckle is incredibly stiff. My baby cries every time I try to clip it. Called support — they said it loosens over time. Not helpful.
Heavy seat. Hard to carry when attached to stroller. The base is very wide — didn't fit well in my compact car.
Best infant seat I've tried. Baby sleeps so well in it. Love that it clicks into our Chicco stroller perfectly.
Buckle was stiff from day one. My husband had to use both hands. Baby was screaming. Returned it.
Took a flight with this. The airline gate-checked it without any issue. Lightweight enough to carry through security.
Perfect for twins. Bought two. Both installed easily. Great value for the price compared to Graco.
Fabric is a bit rough. After long drives my newborn gets red marks. Wish the padding was softer.
Works well for road trips. Stays locked in place even on bumpy roads. The level indicator is very helpful for proper angle.
منتج رائع جداً، طفلتي مرتاحة فيه من أول يوم. التركيب كان سهلاً جداً.
الحزام صعب جداً. لا أستطيع إغلاقه بسهولة وطفلي يبكي دائماً عند محاولة تركيبه.
ممتاز للرضع. الوزن مقبول ويتناسب مع عربة الأطفال. لكن الظل صغير.
جيد لكن حجم القاعدة كبير ولم يتلاءم مع سيارتي الصغيرة.
اشتريته لحديثي الولادة وهو مريح جداً. ينام طفلي بشكل أفضل داخله.
Great seat overall. However, the chest clip sits too high for smaller babies. Adjusted after reading manual.
The latch connectors are the best I've seen. Clicked in first try. No wobble at all.
Buckle too stiff. After 3 months still not loosened. My wife has wrist issues and can't use it alone.
Good for travel. Compact when removed from base. Used it as airplane seat with a seatbelt install — worked well.
Decent quality but cleaning is a pain. The cover doesn't come off easily and the straps can't be put in washing machine.
